calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-16-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Cases CSM-17-856643, CSM-17-856746, CSM-17-856748, CSM-17-856841, CSM-18-857562, CSM-18-858590, CSM-18-859130, CSM-18-859171 are consolidated and before the Court.
Per Appellant's request, cases CSM-17-856643, CSM-17-856746, CSM-18-858590, CSM-18-859130, CSM-18-859171 are dismissed as these cases have settled.
Respondent/Plaintiff Reid Smiegiel appeared in pro per.
Respondent/Plaintiff Alexander Gabriel appeared in pro per.
Respondent/Plaintiff Zachary Howitt appeared in pro per.
Ilana G. Zelener, Esq., appeared on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Equifax Inc.
Rodney L. Lewis, Esq., appeared pro hac vice on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Equifax Inc.

These cases come on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Respondent/Plaintiff Reid Smiegiel testifies on his own behalf.
Respondent/Plaintiff Alexander Gabriel testifies on his own behalf.
Respondent/Plaintiff Zachary Howitt testifies on his own behalf.

Ilana G. Zelener and Rodney L. Lewis testify on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Equifax, Inc.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Respondent/Plaintiff Reid Smiegiel 's Group Exhibit A: Documents
Respondent/Plaintiff Alexander Gabriel 's Group Exhibit A: Documents
Respondent/Plaintiff Zachary Howitt's Group Exhibit A: Documents

Appellant/Defendant's witness Darrell Villacruz testifies on behalf of Appellant Equifax, Inc.
Dept. 525; Judge Pro Tem: Elliott Myles; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported.
